playbook.intent: Inherited client surface -> redesigned priority flows + validated + handoff with KPIs.
playbook.scope: Outsource designer takes an existing client surface across 4 weeks. Includes targeted research, IA + heuristic cleanup, hi-fi redesign on priority flows, validation, and a handoff with KPI scoreboard. Done when client signs off and KPI scoreboard is wired for post-launch measurement.

success-criteria.criterion: Client signs off on the redesign before delivery
Priority flows validated with users or proxies
Design KPI scoreboard wired with baseline + targets
Handoff package accepted by the client's engineering team

stage.name: Discovery intake

tasks.task: Run a discovery questionnaire with the client
Capture brand, tech, and compliance constraints
Audit current surface for content + IA issues

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when constraints are written and acknowledged.

stage.name: Targeted research

tasks.task: Run 5 JTBD interviews (real users or client-side proxies)
Define success metrics for the redesign

outputs.output: JTBD + pain point list + success metrics

stage.decision-gate: Advance when client accepts the JTBD framing.

stage.name: Heuristic + cognitive walkthrough

tasks.task: Pick priority flows for redesign investment

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when client agrees on priority flows.

stage.name: Redesign

tasks.task: Apply design tokens (use client's system or scaffold one)

stage.decision-gate: Advance when prototype walks priority flows without dead ends.

stage.name: Validate
stage.intent: Test with users before client sign-off.

tasks.task: Run 5 usability sessions on priority flows

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when critical issues are resolved.

stage.name: Client sign-off

tasks.task: Walk through the design KPI scoreboard

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when sign-off is written, not verbal.

stage.name: Handoff

tasks.task: Hand off to client engineering with a walkthrough

stage.decision-gate: Done when client engineering accepts the package.

extra.value: ['Skipping research because ''client knows their users'' -> assumptions, not signal', Designing without tokens -> client engineering rejects handoff, No KPI scoreboard -> redesign value cannot be proven]
['Did the client agree to KPI targets before launch?', 'Can the client''s engineering build from the handoff without questions?', 'Did priority flows test cleanly with users?']

{human: faion get-content client-deliverable-redesign-for-outsource-engagement-4-weeks --format md, agent: faion get-content client-deliverable-redesign-for-outsource-engagement-4-weeks --format context, json: faion get-content client-deliverable-redesign-for-outsource-engagement-4-weeks --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft from F-059-063 chunk-05.}]
